title: Cozy Earthy Keto Delight
description: A delicious and satisfying keto recipe that combines earthy flavors with a cozy twist.

ingredients.name: Cozy Mushroom Cream Sauce
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a high-quality earthy mushroom variety

instructions: Season the short ribs with salt, pepper, and thyme
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Sear the short ribs until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side
Transfer the short ribs to a baking dish and set aside
Make the cozy mushroom cream sauce by sautéing the mushrooms in a skillet over medium heat until tender
Add the garlic and heavy cream to the skillet and stir to combine
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook until slightly thickened
Pour the sauce over the short ribs and cover the dish with foil
Bake the short ribs in the preheated oven for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender
Remove the foil and top the short ribs with keto cream cheese
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cream cheese is melted and bubbly
Serve the short ribs hot, garnished with fresh parsley
